attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CONTENT)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.CARTON_CONTENT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.PACKOUT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.SO_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ITEM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.SERIAL_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.COO, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ROHS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.PROCESSING_MODULE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ERROR_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT,
 (
 select CARTON_CONTENT_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT
 minus
 select CARTON_CONTENT_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNTNT
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CARTON_CONTENT_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.CARTON_CONTENT_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_CARTON_CNT.REFRESH_DATETIME
